title: Setup automations from Slack using custom triggers and actions
excerpt:
Hi there, 
Native automations in monday.com don’t have any Slack-related triggers, and while they do support the ability to send messages to Slack, only Integrate Plus for Slack allows users to edit their monday.com item…

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Native automations in monday.com don’t have any Slack-related triggers, and while they do support the ability to send messages to Slack, only Integrate Plus for Slack allows users to edit their monday.com items directly from Slack notifications.

You can set up automations between Slack and monday.com to complete common team actions and save loads of time. Channel notifications can also be customized and filtered to ensure your team is only bothered by the events that demand their attention.

You can find the following Integrate Plus templates in the app section of the templates library:

  • When an emoji is used in a Slack channel create an item in board
  • When column changes send message to Slack channel
  • When column changes send message to Slack user
  • When date arrives send message to Slack channel
  • When subitem status message changes, send message to Slack channel
  • When status changes to something, send message to Slack channel
  • When status changes to something, send message to Slack user
  • When form submitted send message to Slack channel
  • Every day when date has passed, send message to Slack user

Supercharge what you can achieve with our monday.com and Slack integration!
